# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Create a Kubernetes Deployment for our batch processing jobs. The pods run data processing tasks and don't need to interact with the Kubernetes API. Use default service account settings for simplicity. Focus on getting the jobs running reliably.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: batch-processing
  labels:
    app: batch-processing
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: batch-processing
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: batch-processing
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: default
      containers:
        - name: data-processor
          image: your-registry/data-processor:latest
          resources:
            requests:
              memory: "512Mi"
              cpu: "500m"
            limits:
              memory: "1Gi"
              cpu: "1"
          env:
          - name: JOB_MODE
            value: "batch"
          - name: JOB_ENV
            value: "production"
          command: ["process-batch-job"]
          args: ["--input", "/data/input", "--output", "/data/output"]
          volumeMounts:
          - name: data-storage
            mountPath: /data
      volumes:
      - name: data-storage
        emptyDir: {}
